race.comment: NULKABA STAR (2) was run off his legs last time out over 900m at Newcastle. Fitter for two runs back from a spell and although he has had plenty of chances this looks a nice race. The generous pre-race quote is appealing. HOT CHOCKS (4) has not appeared since making plenty of late ground to grab third on debut over this course and distance in September. Trialling well and from a good gate looks sure to make a positive return. MOKE LAKE (1) rushed home late but just missed the placings over 900m at Muswellbrook last Monday. Keeps performing despite a busy schedule. Each-way hope. Market watch on TWICE AZ COOL (7) for Rodney Northam who hasn't raced since debuting in February 2025. STARVERNA (9) is trialling very well leading into this debut. Star Turn filly who should be popular with punters.
